zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Stourton於1203年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Alexander de Stourton39歲，母親Amabilis De Sylvester34歲。她於1222年與Sir Thomas Bamville在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1260年在英國英格蘭爾切斯特享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Stourton于1203年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Alexander de Stourton39岁，母亲Amabilis De Sylvester34岁。她于1222年与Sir Thomas Bamville在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1260年在英国英格兰爾切斯特享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Stourton was born in 1203, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Alexander de Stourton, was 39 and her mother, Amabilis De Sylvester, was 34. She married Sir Thomas Bamville in 1222, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1260, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Stourton est née en 1203, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander de Stourton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Amabilis De Sylvester, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Bamville en 1222, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1260, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Stourton 1203 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander de Stourton 39 und ihre Mutter Amabilis De Sylvester 34. Sie hat 1222 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Bamville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Stourton è nata il nel 1203 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Alexander de Stourton, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Amabilis De Sylvester, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Bamville nel 1222, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1260, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Stourtonが1203年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander de Stourtonは39歳，母Amabilis De Sylvesterは34歳であった。1222年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Thomas Bamvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1260年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Stourton(이)가 1203년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander de Stourton(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amabilis De Sylvester(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Sir Thomas Bamville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Stourton nasceu em 1203, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander de Stourton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Amabilis De Sylvester, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Bamville em 1222, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1260, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Stourton родилась в 1203 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander de Stourton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilis De Sylvester, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Bamville в 1222 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1260 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Stourton nació en 1203, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander de Stourton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Amabilis De Sylvester, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Bamville en 1222, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1260, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
